- Description: Nelanco AWS Trust & Safety case 177613748700177 — unblock + consolidated reply

  Details:
  Diagnosed why AWS support case 177613748700177 (Nelanco account 767697632458) kept auto-nudging: the Apr-30 resource list was never explicitly confirmed, prior replies came from IAM/SSO not root, and the May-20 location/user questions were open. Built a read-only multi-region inventory tool (scripts/aws/inventory_account.py) and swept the account: 15 instances, 9 key pairs, 39 AMIs, 56 snapshots, 4 non-default SGs — all reconciled to legitimate operator assets; root MFA on, zero root access keys. Authored a single paste-ready reply closing all three open items; operator sent it 2026-05-27 as root. Confirmed the account has no active root access key and cleaned a stale credential from the IR repo .env.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
